text:
Type F (Also known as TYPE-F) is a term in the Evangelion franchise:

Evangelion Unit-01 Type F, Evangelion Unit that debuted in Neon Genesis Evangelions.
Evangelion Unit-02 Type F, Evangelion Unit that debuted in '.
Evangelion Unit-00 Type F, Evangelion Unit that debuted in '.
Evangelion Unit-00 Type F Allegorica, Evangelion Unit that debuted in Neon Genesis Evangelion: ANIMA.
Neon Genesis Evangelion Characters TYPE-F, Bandai Shokugan's figure line.
F-Type Equipment [Airborne Warfare], Evangelion equipmentused to transport the Evangelion units.
